metrics.name: azure_cachehits_total
metrics.description: The number of successful key lookups.

metrics.name: azure_cachemisses_total
metrics.description: The number of failed key lookups.

metrics.name: azure_evictedkeys_total
metrics.description: The number of items evicted from the cache.

metrics.name: azure_expiredkeys_total
metrics.description: The number of items expired from the cache.

metrics.name: azure_getcommands_total
metrics.description: The number of get operations from the cache.

metrics.name: azure_setcommands_total
metrics.description: The number of set operations to the cache.

metrics.name: azure_totalcommandsprocessed_total
metrics.description: The total number of commands processed by the cache server.

metrics.name: azure_cachelatency_average
metrics.description: The latency to the cache in microseconds (preview).

metrics.name: azure_cacheread_maximum
metrics.description: The amount of data read from the cache in Megabytes per second (MB/s).

metrics.name: azure_cachewrite_maximum
metrics.description: The amount of data written to the cache in Megabytes per second (MB/s).

metrics.name: azure_connectedclients_maximum
metrics.description: The number of client connections to the cache.

metrics.name: azure_operationspersecond_maximum
metrics.description: The number of instantaneous operations per second executed on the cache.

metrics.name: azure_totalkeys_maximum
metrics.description: The total number of items in the cache.

metrics.name: azure_percentprocessortime_maximum
metrics.description: The CPU utilization of the Azure Redis Cache server as a percentage.

metrics.name: azure_serverload_maximum
metrics.description: The percentage of cycles in which the Redis server is busy processing and not waiting idle for messages.

metrics.name: azure_usedmemory_maximum
metrics.description: The amount of cache memory used for key/value pairs in the cache in MB.

metrics.name: azure_usedmemorypercentage_maximum
metrics.description: The percentage of cache memory used for key/value pairs.

metrics.name: azure_georeplicationhealthy_maximum
metrics.description: The health of geo replication in an Active Geo-Replication group. 0 represents Unhealthy and 1 represents Healthy.
